theme: Skia m151 sync and bug fixes
highlights_headline: SkiaSharp 4.151.0 syncs upstream Skia m151 bug fixes and plugs a native resource leak.

bullets.lead: Skia m151 upstream bug fixes merged
bullets.detail: Incorporates the latest chrome/m151 upstream bug fixes from the Skia engine.

bullets.lead: Native resource leak fixed in SKImage.FromEncodedData
bullets.detail: SKImage.FromEncodedData(SKData, SKRectI) no longer leaks a native image handle when a subset rect is specified.
